$schema.description: JSON Schema reference — add this for editor autocomplete

disabled.description: Set true to suppress all Thesmos MCP tool responses. Use when token spend is too high or you want to temporarily pause Thesmos governance checks. Re-enable by setting to false.

project.description: Human-readable project name shown in reports and adapter files

tier.description: Active licensing tier. 'free' runs the Essentials rule set (all BLOCKERs + the AI-code net); 'premium' runs the full 1,137-rule engine. Resolved automatically from a purchased premium pack if present — set explicitly to override.

power.description: Pantheon orchestration power tier. 'lean' (default): one specialist, a one-line Zeus header, no auto-council — most tasks belong here. 'god': full council/ceremony available for genuinely complex or high-stakes work.

failOnSeverity.description: Severity levels that cause `thesmos validate` and `thesmos ci` to exit 1

warnOnSeverity.description: Severity levels that print a warning but do not fail CI

largeFileThreshold.description: Lines-of-code threshold above which a file is flagged as large (TECH_DEBT)

ignoredFolders.description: Folder names to skip entirely during scanning

criticalLibPaths.description: Glob patterns for files that must never be modified without a governance review

requiredFiles.description: File paths (relative to repo root) that must exist for `thesmos doctor` to pass

secretPatterns.description: Regex patterns for secret detection — added to the built-in set

reportMaxAgeDays.description: Maximum age of .thesmos/report.json in days before it is considered stale

protectedBranches.description: Branch names that receive extra scrutiny in validate and ci commands

disabledRules.description: Rule IDs or category names to skip entirely (e.g. ["GATE_001", "monday_write_no_gate"])

severityRules.description: Override the default severity for specific rule categories

reportMaxAgeDays.description: Maximum report age in days before doctor flags it as stale

requiredScripts.description: npm script names that must be present in package.json

requiredFiles.description: Files that must exist relative to the repo root

requiredIdeDirs.description: IDE config directories that must exist (e.g. [".claude", ".cursor"])

defaultBase.description: Default git base ref for diff (e.g. "origin/main")

gates.description: Additional gate checks to run before validate

outputPath.description: Write findings to this file in addition to stdout

workflow.description: Path to the generated GitHub Actions workflow file

requiresSecrets.description: GitHub Actions secret names that must be configured

generatedSections.description: Section IDs to preserve across scan runs

riskyFilePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files that are always flagged as risky

ideTools.description: IDE tool configuration (key: tool name, value: config path)

scripts.description: Custom script overrides for thesmos commands

design.description: Design governance settings — customize scale values and icon libraries for your design system

cssFramework.description: CSS framework in use. Currently informational — Tailwind-pattern rules detect automatically. Default: 'auto'.

iconLibraries.description: Additional icon library package names to include in mixed-icon detection (DESIGN_016). Merged with the built-in set (lucide-react, @heroicons/react, react-icons, phosphor-react, etc.).

borderRadiusScale.description: Allowed border-radius pixel values for DESIGN_010. Values not in this list are flagged. Default: Tailwind rounded scale [0,2,4,6,8,12,16,24,9999].

animationScale.description: Allowed animation/transition duration values in ms for DESIGN_014. Default: Tailwind duration scale [75,100,150,200,300,500,700,1000].

opacityScale.description: Allowed opacity values (0–1) for DESIGN_018. Default: Tailwind 5% increment scale (0, 0.05, 0.1, … 0.95, 1).

autoMode.description: Real-time Claude Code / Auto Mode governance settings

enabled.description: Whether Thesmos actively governs Auto Mode sessions when hooks are installed

blockOn.description: Minimum severity that blocks a Write/Edit during Auto Mode

notifyOnBlock.description: Show a VS Code notification when a write is blocked

failClosed.description: When true (default), guard infrastructure failures (malformed hook input, unreadable config, internal exceptions) block the tool call. Set false only as an explicit opt-out — never auto-disabled on Windows.

Severity.description: BLOCKER: CI fails. HIGH: warning. MEDIUM/LOW/TECH_DEBT: advisory.
